message.content:
@startuml
actor Actor

participant "«Analysis»\nUIConditionalFormattingCellExtension" as UI1 #LightBlue
participant "«Analysis»\nUIConditionalFormattingCellSideBarExtension" as UISB #LightGreen
participant "«Analysis»\nConditionalFormattingCellPanel" as CFP #Pink

Actor -> UI1 : starts use case
activate UI1
    UI1 -> UISB : create()
        activate UISB
            UISB -> CFP : create()
                activate CFP
                
                    deactivate CFP
                    
                return shows side bar 
                
            deactivate UISB
            
            
deactivate UI1


@enduml
